input.title: Point of Sale and Retail Management

FR-01.title: Product Management with Barcode
requirements: Implement complete product management with barcode functionality
All product management with barcode operations must be validated and authorized
System shall maintain audit log for product management with barcode actions
Support search and filtering within product management with barcode
Enable notifications for important product management with barcode events
acceptance_criteria: User can successfully perform all product management with barcode operations
System validates all product management with barcode inputs correctly
Error messages display clearly for product management with barcode failures

FR-01.title: Build Product Management with Barcode API
FR-01.description: Create REST API endpoints for product management with barcode feature in Point of Sale and Retail Management. Implement business logic, validation, database operations, and error handling. Add authentication and authorization checks.

FR-01.title: Build Product Management with Barcode UI
FR-01.description: Create user interface components for product management with barcode. Implement responsive design with form validation, loading states, error handling, and smooth transitions. Connect to API endpoints.

FR-01.title: Design Product Management with Barcode Database Schema
FR-01.description: Create database tables/collections for product management with barcode. Define fields, data types, constraints, indexes, and relationships. Add migration scripts.
